parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM trades WHERE session_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { response: 'Not enough trades for a meaningful review. You need at least 5 trades in the last 30 days. Keep trading and try again later.' } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.ticker, t.buy_price, t.sell_price, t.quantity,
  t.pnl_amount, t.pnl_pct, t.outcome,
  t.hit_take_profit, t.hit_stop_loss, t.exited_early,
  t.feedback_tags, t.notes, t.session_date,
  s.confidence, s.type as signal_type,
  s.entry_low, s.entry_high, s.take_profit, s.stop_loss,
  s.risk_reward, s.reasoning, s.catalysts, s.risk_level
FROM trades t
LEFT JOIN signals s ON t.signal_id = s.id
WHERE t.session_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY t.session_date DESC
LIMIT 30

INSERT INTO insights (week_start, trades_analyzed, win_rate, insights, adjustments, summary, raw_stats)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.week_start }}',
  {{ $json.trades_analyzed }},
  {{ $json.win_rate }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.insights).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.adjustments).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Calculate Stats').first().json.stats).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
